title: notifications core — feature keys
description: Features exposed at `/auth/me` → `data.features`. Per-channel enablement lives in the respective channel module's features.json. This file publishes only the CORE capabilities (digest engine, template renderer, in-app live updates, marketing consent capture).

features.description: Enables the digest batching pipeline (daily / weekly / monthly). Users can set per-category digest_mode. On enterprise plans this is always on; consumer plans may disable to keep the UI simple.
Enables tenant-specific template overrides. Without this feature, tenants use platform defaults only. Enterprise-tier.
Enables the Reverb-backed live inbox (bell badge updates without page refresh). Requires the in-app module.

Enables consent capture flows for marketing categories (double opt-in for EU/UK, single opt-in with CASL express-consent for CA, opt-out for US). Required for tenants that operate in regulated jurisdictions.
Enables per-user timezone-aware quiet-hours windows. Non-critical notifications held during quiet hours.
Enables the tenant admin dashboard showing send volumes, delivery failure spikes, template publish activity.
